title: OptiForge [OF]
description: A modpack that is almost like optifine on forge!
body:
Yet another optiforge new modpack

### What is the modpack? ###
this modpack makes playing on forge be exactly like you are playing on optifine!
### How do install this modpack? ###
find an launcher with .mrpack file support download my modpack any version then import it then wait for stuff/mods to download and you can click play to play the modpack 
### inspiration? ###
i got the idea from OptiFabric and i thinked hmm why not OptiForge :D

### What does OptiForge do? ###
OptiForge is a modpack like optifine or OptiFabric but for forge :D ye its literly in the name and it makes you fps better and also adds more texture support and yeah thats kinda all more optimization mods and yeah i think thats all i need to say :D
